enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'House Party'?

The song 'House Party' celebrates the joy of gatherings and carefree moments with friends, emphasizing fun and enjoyment.

How does 'House Party' fit into the plot of Chennai 28 II?

This song reflects the youthful spirit and camaraderie among friends, highlighting the party culture that is central to the movie's theme.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Senthil Dass and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'House Party' released?

'House Party' was released on December 9, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'House Party' from Chennai 28 II, the lively beats and engaging lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song captures the essence of friendship and the excitement of partying, making it a perfect anthem for gatherings. With its upbeat tempo and energetic vibe, it evokes feelings of happiness and carefree moments. This track is sure to resonate with anyone looking to relive the fun of youthful celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: House Party from Chennai 28 II is the ultimate anthem for celebrations, bringing together the vibrant energy of Senthil Dass's vocals and Yuvan's catchy beats. This song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the joy of partying with friends. Get ready to groove as this track sets the perfect vibe for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: There is no one at home, so let's take a bottle and talk without fear.
Why think too much when there is no one to ask questions? Let's start the second innings without worry.
Now, there is no ending, it's always a house party. This will become a trend, it's always a house party.
If there are no wives here, it's just a house party. Our lives will be fulfilled only with this house party.
If she was a girlfriend, it would be a different thrill, but if she becomes a wife, it brings a different thrill.
Being friends is always fun, but if it becomes a relationship, it can be a hassle.
Wives are just a teaser of hell, while friends are a trailer of heaven.
Dive into the bottle, come on!
Now, there is no ending, it's always a house party. This will become a trend, it's always a house party.
If there are no wives here, it's just a house party. Our lives will be fulfilled only with this house party.
Even if you hit this daily, it will give you joy, but if you hit too hard, the police will come.
If this mouth opens, it will become a curse, and if her mouth opens, you will be cursed too.
Understanding through experience is good, but now there is nothing to lose anymore.
Now, there is no ending, it's always a house party.
This will become a trend, it's always a house party.
If there are no wives here, it's just a house party. Our lives will be fulfilled only with this house party.
